steps.title: Compare the two periods
steps.content: The passage says Allen's 1970s slab paintings were a clear departure from the prevalence of gestures in his 1960s work. Art historians describe the later process as removing gesture.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported inferences
steps.content: Choice A generalizes about all painting tools, which the passage does not do. Choice C speculates about Allen's changing interests. Choice D introduces realism, which is never discussed. Both Allen's description and historians' description point to fewer gestures in the 1970s than in the 1960s. The answer is B.
